name: Terengganu (Malaysia)
description: A black field with a wide white border. The white border surrounds the central black rectangle on all four sides.
history: The state flag of Terengganu, on Peninsular Malaysia's east coast. Adopted by the Terengganu Sultanate in the 19th century; the white border represents the people, the central black field the Sultan.

features.symbolism: white surrounding black: the people enfolding the Sultan
